title: lupinus montanus subsp. montesii
intro: Lupinus montanus subsp. montesii, also known as Montes' lupine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Lupinus, native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. Lupinus montanus subsp. montesii has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
